version.description: The version of the schema used

id.description: Unique identifier for the record. Must be stable across multiple extractions

source.description: The application source used to get this

pace.description: The pace at a given point of the exercise

cadence.description: The cadence at a given point of the exercise

verticalOscillation.description: Vertical oscillation at a given point of the exercise

speed.description: Speed at a given point of the exercise

stepLength.description: Step length at a given point of the exercise

stanceTime.description: Ground contact time at a given point of the exercise

exerciseId.description: The exercise this metric belongs to

recordedAt.description: The date at which the sleep started, in UTC time

deviceId.description: Unique identifier for the device linked to this record

title: Exercise metrics
description: Extra metrics recorded during an exercise
